notes.type_correctness: CORE_AGENTS exported as Set<string>, consistent with existing QUICK_EXCLUDED_AGENTS pattern. All function signatures unchanged.
notes.pattern_adherence: CORE_AGENTS constant follows the same const Set pattern as QUICK_EXCLUDED_AGENTS and EXPLANATION_AUTHORS. Comment references schema/profile.v1.json as required.
notes.test_coverage: Tests cover CORE_AGENTS constant membership, default placement (no config), and opt-in agent placement. 212 tests pass. TUI default behavior not unit-tested but is a thin wrapper over the constant.
notes.security: No new attack surface. Change is purely about which agent files are placed by default; no auth, network, or privilege changes.
notes.architectural_alignment: Correctly separates mandatory baseline (3 agents) from optional agents. COMMAND_AGENT_DEPENDENCIES still lists merge-resolve requiring sr-merge-resolver, preserving opt-in wiring.
